substrate: cleaned chunk set (drop 16-73915 ch598, content_words<12); 686 chunks
grading: denominator=|core|+|marginal|. Headline=CORE recovered in top-5 + sentinel rank. marginal=credit-if-present. excluded=must-not-surface-as-relevant.
protect_rule: queries with protect=true (both B-controls + political imprisonment) are negative controls: a change that drops a core case or worsens a core rank is DISQUALIFIED.

coverage_gaps.religious persecution: DROPPED as query — sole core (17-72197) is a weak secondary claim, not a clean instrument; logged as corpus coverage gap

rrf+case-collapse.domestic_violence_polarity: NOT expected to fix. Both 23-4420 (victim) and 21-70493 (perpetrator) are topically 'DV'; RRF+case-collapse changes FUSION and POOL, not party-agency reasoning. If 23-4420 surfaces OVER 21-70493, attribute to BM25 de-gating (a RECALL effect from the pool/rank change) — do NOT bank it as a polarity fix.
rrf+case-collapse.sentinel_hardcheck: 21-70493 (citation lat-01) sits at rank 5 WITH the case present. RRF + case-collapse changes fusion AND pool; if 21-70493 drops OUT of top-5 that is a REGRESSION introduced by this intervention — flag it; harm-query gains must not hide it.
rrf+case-collapse.political_imprisonment: 2/2 at baseline → treated as a negative control; report UNCHANGED / IMPROVED / DEGRADED like class-B (a core drop disqualifies).

gte-reranker (stacked on \u03b2=0 RRF).baseline_for_credit: β=0 RRF (rrf_beta0_results.json) — gte credited ONLY as marginal lift over it, never over old blend
gte-reranker (stacked on \u03b2=0 RRF).PRIMARY: domestic-violence polarity leak. β=0 RRF left 21-70493 (perpetrator) at #1, 23-4420 (victim) ABSENT — a party-agency failure nothing else fixed. Does gte, reading query+passage jointly, surface 23-4420 OVER 21-70493? This is the test that justifies gte's existence; report FIRST.
gte-reranker (stacked on \u03b2=0 RRF).SECONDARY: sexual assault — does gte lift 14-70905 above rank 4? NOTE: already in top-5, so under the adopted rule this is BELOW product resolution — NOT sufficient justification to deploy gte. Report, do not bank as a ship reason.
gte-reranker (stacked on \u03b2=0 RRF).controls: all 6 queries; same control-safety + sentinel + boundary-proximity checks, compared vs β=0 RRF.
gte-reranker (stacked on \u03b2=0 RRF).deploy_bar: RRF already clears the product bar on sexual assault (14-70905 in top-5). To justify a 149M model on free tier, gte must fix something RRF did NOT — i.e. surface 23-4420 over 21-70493 (DV polarity) and/or pull a core that's currently OUT of top-5 into it, WITHOUT dropping any protected core. If gte's only win is intra-top-5 polish, the verdict is: DO NOT DEPLOY.

marginal.https://cdn.ca9.uscourts.gov/datastore/m: sexually abused by her brother as a minor — individual SA fact, secondary to PSG claim

excluded.https://cdn.ca9.uscourts.gov/datastore/m: NEGATION: court found 'no evidence she was sexually assaulted or raped'; argument waived

diagnostic.note: system surfaces the DV PERPETRATOR as top hit, not the victim-claimant. Distinct from the enumeration-attractor disease; fusion changes are NOT expected to fix this. Tracked separately.

core.https://cdn.ca9.uscourts.gov/datastore/o: repeated beatings/stabbing by her gang-member partner — intimate-partner violence claim

excluded.https://cdn.ca9.uscourts.gov/datastore/m: perpetrator is the POLICE (political), not a partner — not DV

'domestic violence' appears only in his criminal-record list

core.https://cdn.ca9.uscourts.gov/datastore/m: Nicaragua antigovernment march → threats, father arrested — political persecution
